goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: Harness synchronization: exact linked href and route wiring are correct, Start cooking server-renders initially, and the same functional path previously passed before CSS-only changes. The test clicked a Next Link then immediately queried the destination without awaiting client navigation. Add exact URL wait around the real click only.

worker_package.objective: Change only cooking E2E navigation synchronization, then complete cooking/full/protected/build/disposable/integrity gates in isolation.
verify: Await exact /recipes/{id}/cook?mealPlanEntryId={mealId} around real link click; then require existing Start cooking visible.
Run scoped format/lint and complete cooking E2E.
Run full lint/type/unit/integration/OpenAPI, isolated build, three unchanged protected E2Es, disposable DB, port/hash/diff/status/live PID integrity.
stop_if: Exact URL/response/Start cooking still fails; capture logs/artifacts.

evidence: Link href/route query wiring are exact.
Current spec lacks explicit client navigation wait.

parallel_safety.rationale: One spec and serial isolated lifecycle/oracles.

required_board_updates: Require final Judge after all gates.
